ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the product */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the product (e.g., pills, capsules) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is active and available for sale */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the product (e.g., SKU) */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the product */,
  "recommended_usage" TEXT /* Recommended usage instructions */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Known side effects of the product */,
  "prescription_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if a prescription is required to purchase the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "is_root_category" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the category is a root category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the manufacturer */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the manufacturer's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_tiers" (
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing tier */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the tier belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in this tier */,
  "price_per_unit" TEXT /* Price per unit of the product in this tier */,
  "savings" TEXT /* Total savings for this quantity */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price for the quantity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tier is active and available for purchase */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the pricing tier becomes active */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the pricing tier expires */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_tiers_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the platform */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer account is active */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., individual, healthcare provider) */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax ID or VAT number */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "total_spent" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "order_number" TEXT /* Unique order number for tracking */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code used for the order */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., standard, express) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in the order item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order item */,
  "price_per_unit" TEXT /* Price per unit of the product in the order item */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the order item */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the order item */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment transaction */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the transaction is associated with */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was processed */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "transaction_id_external" TEXT /* External transaction ID from the payment processor */,
  "authorization_code" TEXT /* Authorization code from the payment processor */,
  "refund_status" TEXT /* Status of any refund (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_details" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping detail */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the shipping detail is associated with */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for shipping */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Cost of shipping */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the shipment */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Current status of the delivery (e.g., in transit, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order history entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the history entry is associated with */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., status update, address change) */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  "changed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "is_default_role" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role is a default role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role the permission is assigned to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_default_permission" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the permission is a default permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_levels" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory level entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the inventory level is for */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product currently in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory level was last updated */,
  "last_inventory_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory check */,
  "next_inventory_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the next inventory check */,
  "minimum_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level for the product */,
  "maximum_stock_level" INTEGER /* Maximum stock level for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_levels_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the review is for */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review is approved for display */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cart_items" (
  "cart_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart item */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who added the item to the cart */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in the cart */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the cart */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the item was added to the cart */,
  "is_saved_for_later" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the item is saved for later */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the cart item was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_items_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
